synopsis: [El-errata] ELBA-2026-50096 Oracle Linux 9 smartmontools bug fix update
overview: Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2026-50096
description:
[1:7.2-9.0.1]
- smartmontools: Fix bug for key types other than a-z not supported [Orabug: 38907908]
- smartmontools: Fix bug for SCSI json mismatched format type
full_text:
Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2026-50096

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2026-50096.html

The following updated rpms for Oracle Linux 9 have been uploaded to the Unbreakable Linux Network:

x86_64:
smartmontools-7.2-9.0.1.el9.x86_64.rpm

aarch64:
smartmontools-7.2-9.0.1.el9.aarch64.rpm


SRPMS:
http://oss.oracle.com/ol9/SRPMS-updates/smartmontools-7.2-9.0.1.el9.src.rpm



Description of changes:

[1:7.2-9.0.1]
- smartmontools: Fix bug for key types other than a-z not supported [Orabug: 38907908]
- smartmontools: Fix bug for SCSI json mismatched format type
